description_long: This is a single closed-toe slip-on shoe with a matte black exterior and a visible cork midsole at the heel. The upper is made of a soft, likely suede or nubuck material, and features a wide strap with a button or buckle detail across the instep. The interior is lined with plush, dark-colored faux fur, providing insulation and comfort. The outsole appears to be made of textured rubber, designed for grip and durability. The overall design is casual and functional, suitable for both indoor and light outdoor urban use.
description: A matte black slip-on shoe with a cork midsole, plush fur lining, and a wide strap across the top. The shoe is casual, comfortable, and designed for everyday urban wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the cork midsole, plush fur lining, and the open heel design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wide strap, button detail, and the full profile of the shoe.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the closed toe and the broad, seamless upper surface.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the strap, buckle detail, and the cork midsole at the heel.
